visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain overlay on dark backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px borders with white/10 opacity to separate elements without heavy shadows.
visual_enhancers.hover_effects: Slight scale-up (scale-105) on images, brightness increase on glass cards, text color shift to white on hover.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use ambient glow (drop-shadow) for active elements.

layouts.grid_system: Bento grids for category and location showcases. Use gap-6 or gap-8.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for main sections. Container padding px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-12.
layouts.alignment: Left-align dense text. Center-align hero elements. Optical alignment for icons.

choreography.opening_sequence: Full-screen fixed overlay (z-[100]). Logo scales in smoothly. After 2s, overlay slides up (y: '-100%') revealing the hero section.
choreography.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal for the headline 'Find a home you\'ll actually want to come back to'. Text wrapped in overflow-hidden, inner span translates from y: 100% to y: 0.
choreography.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion whileInView to trigger fade-up and slight y-translation for section headings and cards.
choreography.momentum_scrolling: Implement Lenis wrapper for smooth buttery scrolling.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary uses indigo-600. Secondary uses transparent with border-white/20. Add active:scale-95 on tap.
components.cards: Cardless or flat rectangular with 1px border. No heavy shadows. Use glassmorphism only for sticky headers and small floating elements.
components.tabs: Search interface tabs should be underlined or pill-shaped with active state background. Smooth layout animation between active tabs using layoutId in framer-motion.
components.inputs: Shadcn-like styling. bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-slate-500 rounded-lg focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500.

image_urls.description: Luxury real estate exterior at night

accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='tab-rent').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over images has a dark gradient overlay (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent) for readability.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus states using focus:ring-2 on inputs/buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling at the root level.
Create the animated logo splash screen using framer-motion that unmounts or slides away to reveal the main content.
The hero section needs a real functional search tab component with 'Buy', 'Rent', 'Short Stay', and 'Agents'.
Use standard grid/flex HTML tags, avoiding overly nested structure, keep DOM clean.
For the Footer, use lucide-react for icons (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube).
Never use purely transparent backgrounds on elements overlaying text, always add a glass blur or solid color.
Include a smooth editorial marquee with slow speed for the 'manifesto' or brand highlights.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Create depth with layered elements and z-index hierarchy.
Avoid universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties.
NEVER center align the app container in global css (.App { text-align: center }).
NEVER use placeholder AI emojis for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, active states).
